author: hbicofbiology
name: ChainReaction
short: Turn-based word game with join button, countdown turns, lives, and economy winner reward.
description: Players join via a button during a 60-second lobby. The game then runs turn-by-turn in join order. Each turn has a 10-second countdown (embed updates every second). Players may retry within the 10 seconds, but only real English words that satisfy the rule are accepted. Players start with 3 lives; failing to answer in time costs 1 life. Last player standing wins and can be rewarded via Red's Bank (default +10000).
install_msg: ✅ ChainReaction loaded! Use `[p]chain start` in a channel to open a 60s Join lobby. Minimum 2 players. Optional economy payout: `[p]chain setreward 10000` and `[p]chain economy true`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs for active games (joined players) and per-user stats (wins, games played, eliminations).
